description: Letter/petition from a certain Yehuda to a dignitary named David (Maimonides?). Refers to a [pe]siqa which took place 20 years ago. Only a small piece from the left side of the document is preserved, with the ends of about 7 lines.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
